Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT late, OR-NOT late

Matched
0 I 4
1 OR 50
2 OR 61
3 OR 72
4 OR 03
5 OR 14
6 OR 25
7 OR 36

Applying to 11010100
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 OR 50 = OR(I 5,I 0) = OR(1,1) = 1
2 OR 61 = OR(I 6,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1
3 OR 72 = OR(I 7,I 2) = OR(0,0) = 0
4 OR 03 = OR(I 0,I 3) = OR(1,1) = 1
5 OR 14 = OR(I 1,I 4) = OR(1,0) = 1
6 OR 25 = OR(I 2,I 5) = OR(0,1) = 1
7 OR 36 = OR(I 3,I 6) = OR(1,0) = 1

\boxed{01101111}
